title: CT7.N07 completed discharge record — Payload lemma — build P_7→3 — external-type defect
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for CT7.N07, the payload constructor node “Payload lemma — build P_7→3 — external-type defect” of tactic CT7 (Exchange trichotomy). It refines the common node-proof record with this node's exact identity, completion state, assigned contract evidence, and any required payload or terminal certificate.

tacticId.description: Framework tactic discriminator for CT7.N07. It must be exactly `CT7`, selecting Exchange trichotomy (exchange) as the tactic that owns the payload constructor step “Payload lemma — build P_7→3 — external-type defect” in the exhaustive proof flow.

nodeId.description: Stable graph-node identifier for the obligation “Payload lemma — build P_7→3 — external-type defect”. It must be exactly `CT7.N07` so the evidence, dependencies, outgoing branch, and any terminal result are attributed to this step rather than another node.

nodeNumber.description: One-based ordinal of CT7.N07 within tactic CT7 (Exchange trichotomy). It must be exactly 7, matching the N07 suffix and the node's position in that tactic graph.

status.description: Required completion state for CT7.N07. It must be exactly `proved`, meaning that the node's mathematical assertion or construction has been established for the payload constructor obligation “Payload lemma — build P_7→3 — external-type defect”; another lifecycle value does not discharge this concrete node.

dischargedContracts.description: Contract identifiers whose proof obligations are discharged at CT7.N07. The array must contain `S-Rout`; these are precisely the contracts assigned to “Payload lemma — build P_7→3 — external-type defect”. Listing an identifier records discharge status but does not replace the matching typed evidence record required in `contractInstances`.

contains.description: Requires `S-Rout` to occur in CT7.N07's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that packages a typed payload and verifies its unique producer-to-consumer route for the obligation “Payload lemma — build P_7→3 — external-type defect”.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract-evidence records that justify CT7.N07 from the recorded branch state. The array must contain at least one instance for every assigned schema: S-Rout (payloadId, producerTacticId, consumerTacticId, tupleEntries, vocabularyVerified, uniqueConsumerVerified, evidence). Every instance must include its schema discriminator and nonempty evidence as required by the referenced contract definition; together the records must establish the displayed node statement.

schema.description: Contract discriminator for a `S-Rout` evidence instance at CT7.N07. It must be exactly `S-Rout`, identifying the contract that packages a typed payload and verifies its unique producer-to-consumer route; the same instance must supply payloadId, producerTacticId, consumerTacticId, tupleEntries, vocabularyVerified, uniqueConsumerVerified, evidence.

producedPayloads.description: Typed routing outputs constructed by CT7.N07. The array must contain `P_7_to_3`; these payload identifiers carry the data certified by “Payload lemma — build P_7→3 — external-type defect”. The required consumer routes are `P_7_to_3` → CT3. Their construction and consumer compatibility must be justified by the node's `S-Rout` contract instance.

contains.description: Requires payload `P_7_to_3` among the outputs of CT7.N07; this is the typed handoff constructed by “Payload lemma — build P_7→3 — external-type defect” for CT3.

statement.informal: Construct or verify: Payload lemma — build P_7→3 — external-type defect

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Provide a proof/definition/computation artifact that establishes the displayed statement from the recorded branch state and satisfies every listed contract schema.
